taskTemplate.name: Flood Certificate Review
taskTemplate.description: Review flood certificate for accuracy against system data and verify life of loan coverage

subTaskTemplate.name: Address Matches System
subTaskTemplate.description: Address Matches System – Property address on flood certificate matches the address in the system; completing this task will copy the address to the flood order address checker to ensure accuracy in case of future address changes
subTaskTemplate.type: Flood Certificate Review – Address Matches System

subTaskTemplate.name: Flood Zone Matches System
subTaskTemplate.description: Flood Zone Matches System – Flood zone designation on certificate matches the zone recorded in the system
subTaskTemplate.type: Flood Certificate Review – Flood Zone Matches System

subTaskTemplate.name: Life of Loan Coverage Obtained
subTaskTemplate.description: Life of Loan Coverage Obtained – Life of loan flood zone monitoring coverage has been obtained
subTaskTemplate.type: Flood Certificate Review – Life of Loan Coverage Obtained

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Address Mismatch Detected – The property address on the flood certificate does not match the address in the system. Selecting Done will confirm that the discrepancy is a non‑material variation and the certificate is acceptable as is. Selecting Issue will trigger a task to request an updated flood certificate reflecting the correct address.
subTaskTemplate.type: Flood Certificate Review – Address Mismatch Detected
